# ANALYSIS: BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE_OBSERVATION_ACCUMULATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-22
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** watcher_observation_plan
**Status:** DRAFT (for internal tracking)

## Hypothesis
We hypothesize that the PM session (13:00-15:00 ET) contains a higher quality subset of bullish setups that, when gated, will achieve a win rate of at least 55% over a sufficient sample size (N>=100) to promote the watcher to PROMISING status.

## Mechanism
The BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE watcher is already configured to observe only the PM session (13:00-15:00 ET) for bullish setups. We will allow the watcher to run and accumulate observations until we have at least 100 new long-only observations in the PM session. We will then evaluate the win rate of these observations.

## Expected impact on OP-21 promotion gate
| Metric | Current | Target | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| N (new long-only PM observations) | 0 (starting accumulation) | >=100 | In progress |
| WR (win rate) | unknown | >=55% | To be measured |

## OP-20 disclosures
1. **Account-size assumption:** The watcher is for observation only, no trades are placed. Therefore, account size is not applicable for the observation phase. When the watcher is promoted and used for live trading, the account-size assumption will be as per the strategy it gates (e.g., for bullish setups, the BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup requires $25K+ for full headline P&L).
2. **Sample bias:** We are accumulating observations only from the PM session (13:00-15:00 ET) on days when the watcher is active. This is a time-of-day filter, which may introduce bias if the PM session has different market characteristics than other times. We are targeting N>=100 to mitigate small-sample bias.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are accumulating in-sample observations; out-of-sample test will be required for promotion beyond the watcher gate).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (the watcher is observation-only, so no real-fills are involved in the observation phase. When used for live trading, real-fills validation will be required).
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: If the PM session has a string of losses, the win rate may fall below 55% even with N>=100.
   - Max drawdown: Not applicable for observation-only.
   - Blow-up scenario: Not applicable.
6. **Concentration:** We will monitor the concentration of P&L across dates to ensure no single day dominates the results.

## Pre-merge gate
To promote the watcher to PROMISING status, we need:
- N >= 100 new long-only observations in the PM session (13:00-15:00 ET)
- WR >= 55% on these observations

## Confidence
6 / 10 -- Based on the initial observation that the PM session had WR=65.6% on N=61 (pre-fix), we are optimistic that with more data we can achieve WR>=55%. However, the pre-fix sample was small and the confidence tier fix may have changed the observations.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact
This analysis supports the existing candidate #9 (BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE) by providing the data needed to meet its OP-21 promotion gate. It does not conflict with any other candidates.
